titleStmt.title: SII 28.161: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 161. (A.R. No. 316 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records that Karuppāṟuḍaiyāṉ alias Rājādhirāja-ppallavarayaṉ set up a flower garden in Kōyilipūṇḍi alias Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇinallūr, a hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu for supplying one padakku of flowers to God Āḷuḍaiya-nāyaṉār. He purchased 17(1/2) mā, one kāṇi and kīḻ (3/4) of land in three villages and granted the same with the stipulation that from the yield, kaḍamai and kuḍimai would be paid and with the remainder those that were to tend the garden and supply the flowers would be paid their maintenace (ilakkai and koṟṟu). The land was to be included in the pala-varavai. The concerned purchase deeds and the agreement (tiṭṭu) given by the tirunandavana-kkuḍigaḷ were ordered to be entered in the tirukkai-oṭṭi and the record to be inscribed in the temple (tiru-māḷikai).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattunāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatu toṇṭaimāṉum tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum teṉṉavaṉ piramamārāyaṉum
Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy mo
ḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkuk karuppāṟuṭaiyāṉāṉa rājādhirājappallavaraiyaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷaṉāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai koyili pūṇṭi
yāṉa kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇi nallūril vilaikoṇṭu tirunantavaṉamākac ceyvittāṉeṉṟum Ittirunantavaṉamum Iṟaittut tiruppaḷḷittāmamum
paṟittut tiruppū maṇṭapattile Aḷakka koḷḷavum Ivarkaḷ nāḷoṉṟukkup perāl patakkāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum Ivarkaḷukku
Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum kulottuṅkacoḻataṉiṉāyakac caruppetimaṅkalattile Eḻumāvaraikkāṇik kiḻmukkāl nilamum tiruvāliyāṉa Etirili coḻaccaruppetimaṅka
lattile Orumā nilamum rājasūryyaccaruppetimaṅkalattile Oṉpatu mā nilamum Āka Ūrppaṭi patiṉeḻu māvaraik kāṇikkiḻ mukkāl nilam vilaikoṇṭu Iṉṉila
ttukkuk kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟuttu mikuti koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākak kuṭuttāṉeṉṟum Iṉṉilam palavaravai Uṭaṉe kūṭṭavum Iṉṉilam vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇaṅkaḷum
tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷāka Iṭṭa tiṭṭum tirukkaioṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyille kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇu
meṉṟu Ivaṉ collivarakkāṭṭiṉāṉāka toṇṭaimāṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉavāṟe Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ
tirumantiraolai neṟiyuṭaic coḻamuventaveḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai villavarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai
Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Amarakoṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭiyum perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai
koyilipūṇṭiyāṉa kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇinallūrppāl śrītiruc ciṟṟampalavatikkuk kiḻakku rājarāja vāykkālukkut teṟku 2kū3 catirattu tirumayāṉamuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukku
k kiḻakkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āṉāṟṟukku meṟkum tirunantavaṉampuṟattukku vaṭakkum karuttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta tirunantavaṉakkollai
rūpāy4mā Iṉṉilam nālumāvum kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ taṉiṉāyakac caruppeti maṅkalattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭai nallūr vatikku meṟku Etirili coḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku [ 2 100 9 10 4] catirattu
kiḻakkaṭaiya rūpāy2mām 3�4 catirattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya rūpāy 2mām kātyāyaṉivatikkuk kiḻakku Aṉapāya vāykkālukku rūpāy�3 vaṭakku catirattu meṟkaṭaiya rūpāy2mā nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku rūpāy �l kiḻakkaṭaiya
rūpāy Ë m rūpāy �1 catirattu meṟkaṭaiya rūpāy � kiḻa (1/4) nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku rūpāy mūṉṟumā �m Ālañceri vighneśvaravatikkuk kiḻakku Aṉapāya vāykkālukku vaṭakku 6�1 catirattu meṟkaṭaiya rūpāy � Ivvūr
nattattu maṉai 1ṉāl 5 2mā�m Āka rūpāy Eḻumāvaraik kāṇikkiḻ Eḻumāvarai rājasūryyaccaturvvedi maṅkalattup piṭākai vātuceyvāraṇanallūrt teṉ kūṟu kkaruṇālayavatikkuk kiḻakku
mulaparuṣai vāykkālukku catirat tuṇṭattu 5mā�m Ikkaṇṇāṟṟu catirattut teṟkaṭaiya rūpāy� mm Iṅke 7 100 9 10 2 catirattum 3 catirattuṇṭattum rūpāy �m Iṅke 8kū2 catirattu
teṟkaṭaiya tum 5�m rājarāja nallūrppāl tiruñāṉacampantavatikku meṟku rājarājavāykkālukkut teṟku 2kū4 catirattuk teṉmeṟkaṭaiya rūpāy �cciṉṉamum Itaṉ vaṭakku
teṟkil kollai nila Opāti ṭaiykkiḻ meluṟavum viḷai nilattu Opāti teṟkaṭaiyakkiḻ meluṟavum Iṉṉilattuk kuḷattu Opātiyumuṭpaṭa rūpāym�m
Āka nilam Oṉpatu māvum tiruvāliyāṉa Etirili coḻacaruppeti maṅkalattup piṭākai kaṭal vāyilil Āṉāṟṟu vāykkālukkuk kiḻakku Uttama coḻavatikku meṟku vāykkālukku vaṭakkup pañcavaṉ māteviyār Ellaikku
teṟkuppaṭṭa tuṇṭattu meṟkaṭaiya rūpāy Orumā m Ākat tirunantavaṉakkollai nilam nālumāvum tirunantavaṉappuṟam nilam patiṉeḻu māvaraikkāṇikkiḻ mukkālum palar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇaṅka
ittirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ Iṭṭa tiṭṭukkaḷum tirukkaioṭṭiyile Oṭukki Ippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §§
Digital edition of SII 28.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
